name: @co0ontty/wand
description: A web terminal for local CLI tools like Claude.

scripts.build: node scripts/bundle-wterm.js && node scripts/bundle-qrcode.js && npm run generate:web-assets && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:copy-content && node scripts/stamp-build-info.js && node scripts/fix-dist-permissions.js
scripts.dev: npm run generate:web-assets && tsx src/cli.ts web
scripts.prepublishOnly: TAG=$(git tag --sort=-v:refname --list 'v*' | head -1) && VER=${TAG#v} && npm version $VER --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version && npm run build
